历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 90 → 113 → 121 → 120 → 120, showing a gradual backward shift and then stabilization, with the last three years stable in the 120–121 range; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 120; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Heilongjiang Province was 9 students from 2021 to 2025, increasing to 10 in 2026, a small expansion of about 11%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
Fudan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 6th in 2021 and steadily 5th from 2022 to 2026, making it a top national comprehensive university; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative (mainly involving teacher ethics incidents), but its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 4th nationally (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, reflecting sustained high attention from candidates; historical admission anomaly signals are moderate, with a sharp drop in Henan Science admission scores in 2022, but it has stabilized in recent years.
5. [Advantage Disciplines] It has a large number of strong science and engineering disciplines such as Mathematics (A+), Physics (A+), Biology (A+), Computer Science and Technology (A), Electronic Science and Technology (A), Materials Science and Engineering (A-), Biomedical Engineering (A-), etc., which are highly matched with the Physics Category admission majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics Category admission majors include Engineering Experimental Class (Integrated Circuits, Artificial Intelligence, Intelligent Robotics, etc.), Science Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy), Mathematics Class, Economics and Management Experimental Class, etc.; among them, Computer Science is highly recommended, Electronics/Communication is highly recommended, and Electrical Engineering is highly recommended, with overall major popularity at a high level; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang Province college entrance examination is about 167,000, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 114,000, a slight decrease from 2025 (117,400); Fudan University is located in Shanghai, making it a cross-province application for Heilongjiang candidates; the proportion of Heilongjiang in the university's national enrollment is about 2%–3%, making it a medium-to-small source province with no special regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 120, the slight expansion of the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (9→10), the slight decrease in Physics Category candidates in the province, and the fact that all Physics Category admission majors are high-heat engineering/science directions, the expansion and decrease in candidates tend to lower the ranking (easier to enter), but the rising popularity of majors tends to raise the ranking (harder to enter). After offsetting, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 Physics Category is about 131, with a range of 115–147.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Xianghui Plan, including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Shannon Plan, including Integrated Circuits, Artificial Intelligence, Intelligent Science and Technology, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Integrated Circuits Leading Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mathematics Class (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Integrated Circuits and Micro-Nano Electronics Innovation College)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Robotics and Advanced Manufacturing Leading Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Polymer Materials and Engineering (Smart Wearable Tongyin Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Biomedical Engineering Leading Talent Class)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Statistics, Operations Research, and AI).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Fudan University's Physics Category in Heilongjiang Province offers a rich variety of majors with a wide ranking range (minimum 120, maximum 68 in 2025). The predicted ranking of 131 is in the middle-to-late part of the range. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mathematics Class, various Engineering Experimental Class directions) as the main target, Tier 1 majors (Xianghui Academy, Shannon Plan, Leading Talent Class) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Polymer Materials, Biomedical Engineering, Economics and Management Experimental Class) as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than 115, you can focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 51→44→116→50→52, with an abnormal high of 116 in 2023 quickly stabilizing, and the last two years stable in the 50–52 range; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 52.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Heilongjiang Province was 10 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 13 in 2025, and further expanded to 14 in 2026, with two consecutive years of slight expansion, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; it ranked 6th in the 2021 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings and steadily 5th from 2022 to 2026, belonging to the top comprehensive universities nationwide; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative (mainly related to teacher ethics incidents), but the comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 4th nationwide (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising candidate attention; historical admission anomaly signals are moderate, with no serious gaps; it has 10 A+ disciplines including Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Philosophy, Journalism and Communication, Mathematics, Physics, Biology, Marxist Theory, Theoretical Economics, and Public Health and Preventive Medicine, as well as a large number of strong disciplines such as Law (A-), Applied Economics (A), and Business Administration (A), with top national disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category enrollment majors include Economics, Journalism and Communication, Chinese Language and Literature, Law, and Social Science Experimental Class; among them, Law has divided social heat and wait-and-see, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, and Finance/Economics is divided and wait-and-see; the total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Heilongjiang Province is about 167,000, with History Category candidates estimated at about 53,000, a slight decrease from 2025 (54,700), slightly easing competition pressure; Fudan University is located in Shanghai, which is a cross-province application for candidates in Heilongjiang Province; the proportion of Heilongjiang Province in the university's total national enrollment is about 2%–3%, making it a moderately small source province, with no special regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 52, the slight expansion of History Category enrollment plan in 2026 (13→14), the slight decrease in History Category candidates in the province, and the high Douyin attention, the expansion and decrease in candidates tend to lower the ranking (easier to enter), but the top reputation and high attention tend to raise the ranking (harder to enter), and after offsetting, the ranking is expected to slightly shift backward; the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 56, with a range of 49–63.

Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Law (including Law-Economics, Law-Artificial Intelligence dual degree)
- Economics (including Mathematical Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade, etc.)
- Social Science Experimental Class (State Council School Boying Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

- Chinese Language and Literature (including Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese Language).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- No other low-score majors currently (History Category only has the above 4 major categories, with small differences in admission rankings among majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Fudan University's History Category in Heilongjiang Province has few enrollment majors and concentrated rankings (minimum 52, maximum 37 in 2025), with a score difference of about 15 rankings among majors. The predicted ranking of 56 is in the middle of the range. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Journalism and Communication, Chinese Language and Literature) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Law, Economics, Social Science Experimental Class) as a sprint; when the ranking is significantly better than 49, you can focus on sprinting for top Tier 1 majors.
